purpose: Truth ledger for public official or official-partner schedule calendars that Silbo can review for periodic ICS/ECAL ingestion. checked=true means the source was visited or verified during this pass; it does not mean ingestion is approved under source terms.
rules: Prefer official league, club, federation, or official-partner calendar pages.
Do not ingest third-party fan calendars unless rights and redistribution are reviewed.
Store landing pages first. Capture direct webcal/ics URLs only after terms and refresh behavior are reviewed.
For individual sports, a player follow only becomes exact when the source exposes per-event player fields, draws, bout cards, or start lists.

checked_sources.notes: Premier League says users can sync all fixtures or favourite club calendars and that updates flow through the synced calendar.
Official club page exposes calendar imports for multiple Arsenal fixture lists.
Official LFC help/news points users to Add Fixtures to Calendar on the fixtures page.
NBA.com schedule also exposes Add Games to Calendar; team pages such as Celtics expose schedule download flows.
Official NBA team page supports calendar sync/import.
Official MLB ECAL page supports favourite-team calendar sync.
MLB team pages expose Sync Schedules / Downloadable Schedule; CSV is static and should not be preferred over sync.
Verified Patriots official team schedule-sync page. Need enumerate each hosted NFL team page pattern.
Official NHL ECAL page supports selecting team schedules.
Verified one NHL team page with Add to Calendar; enumerate hosted NHL teams next.
Official F1 calendar covers practice, qualifying, sprints, and races. Series/session follow is a better model than team follow.
